rationale: The cited paper is referenced only as part of grouped background citations on prior text analysis in marketing and early text-mining efforts. In the literature review, it appears alongside other studies to motivate the field context, but the citing paper does not assign it a distinct conceptual or methodological role. There is no direct reuse, extension, or explicit comparison of Lee and Bradlow (2011) within the proposed CTM-HMM framework or empirical analyses.
